**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Nanjing Jiufuyingjin Technology Service Co., Ltd. is a typical micro, intelligence-intensive enterprise in a high-tech zone centered on 'policy compliance and technical outsourcing.' The underlying massive Apple Inc. supply chain and multi-million-level production capacity hallucination have been thoroughly short-circuited by the system. Officials listed it under 'Electronic Device Manufacturing' and stuffed dozens of cutting-edge tech terms like 'quantum computing,' 'satellite communications,' and 'artificial intelligence' into its business license, which runs several hundred words long. However, forensic-level parameter calculations punctured the disguise of a 'major manufacturing plant': the paid-in capital is only 500,000 RMB, the 2024 insured headcount is only '4 people,' and the registered address is 'Room 310-16, Building C, No. 5 Building' in the Baixia High-Tech Zone. Four people doing quantum computing and satellite communication manufacturing in a single office room of a tech park is clearly absurd. Pointing directly to its company name, 'Technology Service Co., Ltd.,' combined with its extremely broad business scope bearing strong 'soft attributes,' the diagnostic conclusion is: this is a 'Tech Intermediary, Patent Agency, & Asset-Light Software Outsourcer.' The various high-end terms piled up are meant to ensure it passes qualification reviews in all aspects when taking on university research outsourcing, government subsidy projects, or acting as an intellectual property agent. What it sells is technical consulting, code, and intellectual property services, having nothing to do with physical manufacturing.
